title: Started feature work and pivoted into a bug fix
final_outcome: Fixed an existing cache invalidation bug and postponed the feature

timeline: **[dev]** Started wiring the feature flag gate.
**[debug]** Pivot: found stale cache behavior during manual verification.
**[dev]** Added a fix and postponed the original feature work.

key_decisions.decision: Fix the stale cache bug first
key_decisions.why: The new feature would have amplified bad behavior

outputs.knowledge: Confirmed stale cache came from missing delete on update

experience_candidates: Cache invalidation bugs are easier to spot while validating adjacent features.

experiences.title: Cache invalidation bugs often surface during unrelated feature validation
experiences.body: Manual verification for a new feature is a good time to watch for stale reads in adjacent paths.
